name: Brainerd Family YMCA
description: Brainerd Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brainerd, MN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
hours: Monday 5:30 AM - 8:30 PM Tuesday 5:30 AM - 8:30 PM Wednesday 5:30 AM - 8:30 PM Thursday 5:30 AM - 8:30 PM Friday 5:30 AM - 7:00 PM Saturday 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM Sunday 9:30 AM - 2:00 PM Footer menu right Contact Us Employment Opportunities © 2020 YMCA The YMCA is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit social services organization dedicated to Youth Development, Healthy Living, and Social Responsibility.

name: Breezy Point Resourt
description: Breezy Point Resourt is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Breezy Point, MN. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Crosby-Ironton High School
description: Come play pickleball at Crosby-Ironton High School in Crosby, MN! There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Crosslake Community Center
description: Crosslake Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Crosslake, MN. There are 9 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: See the Community Center webpage or playtime scheduler
fees: Fee required — $5/day for indoor play or outdoor Monday through Friday mornings.

name: Crosslake Community School
description: Crosslake Community School is a place to play pickleball in Crosslake, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Cuyuna Pickleball Center
description:
No lights. Cuyuna Lakes Pickleball Association league play Monday through Friday 8a - 12p. Courts open to public after 12p weekdays and all day Saturday and Sunday. 

Visit: https://cuyunapickleball.org for more information.

name: Deerwood Auditorium
description: Come play pickleball at Deerwood Auditorium in Deerwood, MN! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Winter play schedule / Play times will be in the form of two-hour sessions
fees: Fee required — Single days are $5/per day / Single day fee for a guest (non-CLPA) is $8.

name: East Gull Lake
description: Come play pickleball at East Gull Lake in Brainerd, MN! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Emily City Hall & Community Center
description:
First come basis for outdoor courts.  
What was listed as an indoor court is not a dedicated pickleball court. It is a small school gym where there is pickleball activity in addition to other scheduled activities.  Recurring times slots are scheduled with the city.
open_play_schedule: No schedule for outdoor courts; first come basis.

name: FitQuest Athletic Club
description: FitQuest Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brainerd, MN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Get "Pickled" Ball
description: Get "Pickled" Ball is a place to play pickleball in Crosby, MN. There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Grand View Lodge
description: Grand View Lodge is a place to play pickleball in Nisswa, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. You can reserve the court. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Gregory Park
description: Gregory Park is a place to play pickleball in Brainerd, MN. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Hallett Center of Crosby
description: Hallett Center of Crosby is a place to play pickleball in Crosby, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball availability is approximately March 10 until October 15.
fees: Fee required — Hallett Center Members: Free / Non-Hallett Members: $10 / day

description: 2 additional courts that require you to bring nets but have permanent lines.

name: Mission Township Pickleball
description: Mission Township Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, MN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

fees: Members only — Membership or daily fee option.
